title: Paige Watters’ Website
text:
Introduction
My name is Paige Watters. I am a third year biology major at the University of California - Riverside, expected to graduate in June 2027.
After graduation, I plan on going to graduate school to recieve my Masters of Science in Nursing (MSN), to later recieve my Doctorate of Nursing Practice (DNP) to become a nurse practitioner.
Outside of school, I love trying new foods, shopping, playing with animals, and spending time on my hobbies. My current hobby is sewing, and I have a couple projects I’ve been working on whenever free time.

title: About Paige Watters
text:
About me
I am 20 years old and from Los Angeles, California. Back in LA, live with my mom and my dog Sassy; Sassy is a chihuahua mix I rescued when I was 9 years old. Last July, I found a stray miniature poodle outside my house, who I decided to keep – his name is Jheri. Jheri lives with my in Riverside because he is fairly low maintenance and socializes well with other dogs (unlike Sassy). If I wasnt pursuing a career in medicine, I would most likely work in ved medicine due to my love for animals.

I also have a boyfriend Chidera. We met my freshman year here at UCR, and have now been dating for a little over 2 years. He has now graduated and works as a financial advisor at Modern Woodman. Last last spring break we traveled to Cancun, Mexico. This year, we’re going to Puerto Vallarta, Mexico.
